data.body:
## Description

TDD Requirement: Write a failing (RED) test asserting no .tickets/ path-ignore or exclude patterns exist in CI workflows and example config files. This test will FAIL (RED) before Task 2 removes the patterns.

## Implementation Steps

1. Create tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh (executable, chmod +x)
2. Source tests/lib/assert.sh for assertion helpers
3. Add header comment block following existing test conventions (see tests/scripts/test-ci-generator-dogfooding.sh as reference)
4. Write test functions:
   - test_ci_yml_no_tickets_paths: assert grep -c '.tickets' .github/workflows/ci.yml returns 0
   - test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths: assert grep -c '.tickets' examples/ci.example.yml returns 0
   - test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude: assert grep -c '.tickets' examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml returns 0
5. Call print_summary
6. Confirm test FAILS (RED) by running it before Task 2

## Test Index Entries

Add to $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index:
  .github/workflows/ci.yml: tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh [test_ci_yml_no_tickets_paths]
  examples/ci.example.yml: tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh [test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths]
  examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml: tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh [test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude]

The [marker] in .test-index marks these as RED tests (tolerated failures). Remove all three markers after Task 2 passes.

## Fuzzy Match Note

test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh normalized = 'testcinovpathssh'. Source files (ciyml, ciexampleyml, precommitconfigexampleyaml) are NOT substrings of this normalized string. .test-index entries are REQUIRED for the test gate to correctly associate these source files with this test.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
- [ ] Test contains test_ci_yml_no_tickets_paths function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_ci_yml_no_tickets_paths' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
- [ ] Test contains test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
- [ ] Test contains test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
- [ ] Test FAILS (RED) with current codebase (patterns still present)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entries added for all three source files with [marker] RED annotations
  Verify: grep -q '.github/workflows/ci.yml.*test-ci-no-v2-paths' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes for other tests (new test is RED-exempt via .test-index markers)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
